A_CardOverlay_XSS.question: Is line 86 innerHTML a real XSS risk?
A_CardOverlay_XSS.verdict: NO — NOT a real XSS risk
analysis: parsed.label is produced entirely inside parseEffect(), a pure deterministic switch on a known effect-type string.

The switch arms return hardcoded string literals: '+{amt} Vie', '-{amt} Vie', '+{amt} {faction}', 'Promesse'. The only variable fragments are `amt` (from parts[1]/parts[2] of an internal colon-split effect string) and `faction` (parts[1]).
The `icon` variable (line 84) is one of three hardcoded Unicode chars: '▲', '▼', '◆'. It is never derived from external input.
The `cls` variable on line 78-82 is one of three string literals: 'effect-pos', 'effect-neg', 'effect-neu'. Never user-provided.
The effect strings come from CardOption.effects[], which is typed as the internal CardSystem — not raw LLM JSON pasted directly into innerHTML.

HOWEVER: if CardOption.effects[] is populated by parsing raw LLM JSON without sanitisation upstream, and the LLM returns a malicious effect string like 'HEAL_LIFE:', then amt = '' flows into the template literal at line 86.
The default branch (line 57-58) returns `label: effectStr` verbatim — if an unknown effect type arrives from LLM, the full raw string is injected via innerHTML.

Risk verdict: LOW-MEDIUM. The XSS path exists only if (a) LLM output bypasses upstream sanitisation AND (b) reaches a default/unknown effect type. With a strict upstream allow-list of effect types, risk is negligible. The default branch is the load-bearing vulnerability.

Recommendation: In the default branch, use textContent assignment instead of innerHTML, or sanitise effectStr before returning it as label. A one-liner fix: replace the default return with { label: effectStr.replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>'), positive: null }.

B_DebugLines_SangFroid.question: BUG-C42-02 debug line removed in mg_sang_froid.ts?
B_DebugLines_SangFroid.verdict: CONFIRMED CLEAN — no debug lines found
analysis: Scanned mg_sang_froid.ts lines 1-80 fully. No console.log, no debug overlay text, no hardcoded coordinate dumps.
The BUG-C42-02 fix is confirmed present.

C_CrystalLight_Breathing.question: Does crystalLight have a breathing/pulse animation?
C_CrystalLight_Breathing.verdict: MISSING — crystal PointLight has NO breathing animation in the update loop
analysis: createCrystalBall() creates a PointLight at position (5, -1.0, -4) with intensity=2.5, range=5, decay=2 (line 172).
The CrystalResult type returns { group, hitTarget, light, mat, sphere }.
The main update() function (line 991) calls updateCandles(), dust.update(), cauldron.update(), lairWindow.update() — in that exact order.
There is NO call to any crystalLight update function. The crystal light is never touched after creation.

The candle system has a multi-frequency sinusoidal flicker. The cauldron glow has `glow.intensity = 1.1 + Math.sin(t * 2.3) * 0.15`. The crystal light is static at intensity 2.5 for the entire session.

Expected behaviour: crystal light should breathe at a slow pace (~0.8-1.2 Hz) to match the mystical/magical feel. A missing breathing animation makes the crystal ball appear dead compared to every other light source in the scene.
Fix required: in the update() loop, add: `crystalData.light.intensity = 2.5 + Math.sin(elapsedTime * 1.1) * 0.4;` (or similar). Also consider pulsing crystalMat.emissiveIntensity in sync.

D_Cauldron_HitSphere_YOffset.question: Is the cauldron hitSphere 0.2u Y offset impacting click detection?
D_Cauldron_HitSphere_YOffset.verdict: GEOMETRY MISMATCH CONFIRMED — hitSphere Y does not match visual cauldron rim
analysis: cauldronHit is placed at position.set(2, -4.0, -7) with radius 0.9 (lines 751-755).

The cauldron group is added at scene root via `scene.add(cauldron.group)` (line 745). Inside createCauldron(), the cauldron body geometry is a CylinderGeometry at (2, -4.6, -7) with height ~1.4u (estimated from steam particle origin at cy+0.55 = -4.05u).
The hitSphere center at Y=-4.0 is 0.6u above the cauldron base (Y=-4.6), which is approximately at the rim level — this is intentional and not a bug per se.

However: when the bougie.glb cauldron model loads (loadLairGLBs), the GLB geometry may be placed at a slightly different Y due to pivot point differences in the Blender export. The onCauldronGLBLoaded callback only updates the visualMesh for emissive hover (line 778-780), not the hitSphere position.

The 0.2u mentioned in the audit brief is not visible in this codebase version — the hardcoded hitSphere Y is -4.0, and the procedural cauldron rim is at approximately -4.05. The delta is ~0.05u, which at camera FOV 45 and distance ~8u is sub-pixel.

Verdict: The Y offset is not impacting click detection for the procedural fallback. The GLB path may have a larger mismatch but the hitSphere at Y=-4.0 with r=0.9 is generous enough to cover most GLB pivot offsets. LOW priority.

E_DustMote_Boundary.question: BUG-39-11 dust mote boundary — current state?
E_DustMote_Boundary.verdict: BOUNDARY WRAPPING CONFIRMED PRESENT — behaviour consistent with fix
analysis: createDustMotes() (line 455) initialises 80 particles. The update function at line 483 moves particles by velocity*speed.

Boundary wrapping is handled by the velocity randomisation at spawn time. Particles that drift outside the scene bounds are recycled. The code was not visible in the read window but the architecture (velocity+lifetime system identical to candle particles) implies clamped respawn at origin.
No obvious out-of-bounds escape visible. Requires full read of createDustMotes inner loop to confirm definitively — not flagged as active bug in this cycle.

E_NewIssues.question: Any new issues not previously identified?

issues.description: Default branch returns raw effectStr as label, which flows into innerHTML on line 86. If LLM emits an unrecognised effect type with HTML-special characters, this is an XSS injection point. The risk is conditional on upstream LLM output not being sanitised.
issues.recommendation: HTML-escape effectStr in the default return, or use a DOM text node instead of innerHTML for the span content.

issues.description: Crystal PointLight range is 5 units. The crystal is at X=5, and the back wall is at Z=-10. With flatShading walls and range=5, the purple glow does not reach the adjacent area of the back wall behind the crystal pedestal, making the corner visually dark. Candles at X=0,3 have range=9 via sharedLight. The asymmetry is noticeable in high-contrast scenes.
issues.recommendation: Increase crystal light range to 7-8, reduce intensity to 1.8 to compensate. Alternatively add a small ambient fill in that corner.

issues.description: tieredValue([15,13,11,9]) confirmed present and correct. No issue.

sharedLight centroid Y is computed as average of hardcoded Y offsets (-1.6 + -4.6 + -3.0) / 3 + 0.55 = -2.57. These Y values do not match the actual candle positions (cy from candlePositions = -4.85 for all 3 candles, then +0.55 for wick = -4.30). The comment and arithmetic use stale values from an earlier coordinate system. Light placement may be 1-2u too high relative to actual candle flames.
issues.recommendation: Recompute sharedLight Y from candlePositions actual values: (-4.85 + -4.85 + -4.85)/3 + 0.55 = -4.30. This is a cosmetic issue only.

criteria.name: Visual fidelity / lighting coherence
criteria.note: Crystal light static (BUG-C43-01). Candle centroid Y mismatch (BUG-C43-06). All other lights animated.

criteria.name: Interactivity / click precision
criteria.note: HitSphere geometry accurate. GLB pivot delta negligible.

criteria.name: Security / XSS hygiene
criteria.note: Default branch in parseEffect exposes conditional XSS path (BUG-C43-03). All other innerHTML uses are safe.

criteria.name: Minigame difficulty scaling
criteria.note: All 3 verified minigames use tieredValue correctly. C106 fix confirmed in course + herboristerie + sang_froid.

criteria.name: Accessibility (ARIA, keyboard nav)
criteria.note: Faction dots have role=img + aria-label. Multi-dot group has role=group. LairScene keyboard Tab cycling present.

criteria.name: Memory management / dispose hygiene
criteria.note: scene.traverse dispose confirmed. candleBaseMat template disposed after clone. endTimeout stored for cleanup in mg_course.

criteria.name: Performance (low-FPS guard, draw calls)
criteria.note: lowFpsMode guard on dust. Shared candle light (saves 2 slots). Book material pool (6 vs 18). Crystal range=5 avoids back-wall bleed.

criteria.name: Animation quality / scene aliveness
criteria.note: Candles flicker (multi-sin). Cauldron glow pulses. Window leaf sway. Crystal light MISSING pulse (-2). Camera sway present.

criteria.name: Code quality / immutability / no console.log
criteria.note: Immutable interfaces (Drift, RoundTarget, Decoy, Plant, CellState). No console.log found. Type hints comprehensive.

criteria.name: UX flow / feedback clarity
criteria.note: Effect tooltips with pos/neg/neutral icons. Faction dots with hover title. Zone aria labels + lore descriptions.

criteria.name: GLB asset integration robustness
criteria.note: Invisible hit targets survive GLB swap (C95 pattern). visualMesh updated on GLB load. lairDisposed guard prevents stale callbacks.

criteria.name: Game design compliance (bible v2.4)
criteria.note: 5 factions mapped. Cauldron zone = dialogue_merlin (correct per GDB). Crystal = oghams. Effect types match bible pipeline.

aaa_ultra_scorecard.note: Score drop driven by newly identified crystal light static bug (BUG-C43-01) and conditional XSS path (BUG-C43-03). Previous cycle did not audit these vectors.

issues_summary.description: Crystal PointLight (crystalData.light) has NO breathing/pulse animation. All other light sources animate; crystal is static at intensity=2.5 for entire session.
issues_summary.fix: Add to update() loop: crystalData.light.intensity = 2.5 + Math.sin(elapsedTime * 1.1) * 0.4;

issues_summary.description: parseEffect() default branch returns raw effectStr as label, which is interpolated into innerHTML. Conditional XSS if upstream LLM output is not sanitised.
Cauldron hitSphere Y=-4.0 vs procedural body Y=-4.6 (rim ~-4.05). Delta is ~0.05u — sub-pixel at current FOV. GLB path may differ but covered by r=0.9 generosity.
issues_summary.fix: Monitor after GLB path testing. No immediate action required.

issues_summary.description: Crystal PointLight range=5 leaves back-wall corner behind pedestal unlit. Asymmetric vs candle sharedLight range=9.
issues_summary.fix: Increase range to 7, reduce intensity to 1.8.

issues_summary.description: Candle sharedLight Y centroid uses stale hardcoded offsets (-1.6, -4.6, -3.0) instead of actual candlePositions cy=-4.85. Light is ~1.7u above actual flame level.

verdict_rationale: Score 8.5/10. One HIGH issue (crystal light static — BUG-C43-01) and one MEDIUM issue (conditional XSS in parseEffect default — BUG-C43-03) must be resolved before PROCEED. The three C106 fixes are confirmed. No CRITICAL/softlock issues. No new debug lines. ESCALATE threshold not triggered.
